decisions.rationale: Observation base_record_id 'route_125th-laguardia-sbs' matches the existing registry record for M60 SBS. The registry record already lists source 2012_12_03_sbs_125th_workshop_summary in its source_ids and route_m60-sbs-125th-workshop in its aliases. Observation resolves to its own base_record_id — no different target needed.

evidence_refs.source_quote: The New York City Department of Transportation (DOT) and MTA New York City Transit (NYCT) conducted a Public Workshop on December 3, 2012 to hear about the critical issues impacting bus movement on 125th Street and to introduce the proposed M60 Select Bus Service on 125th Street.

The presentation reviewed data collected and analyzed, and the input received at the first Public Workshop that took place on September 19, 2012; introduced the selection of the M60 to upgrade to SBS Service with off-board fare collection, dedicated off-set bus lanes and other potential transportation improvements; and SBS amenities that could be implemented on 125th Street.

evidence_refs.source_quote: • M35 should be eliminated and the M100 extended to Randall's Island. • M35 has a more detrimental impact on the intersection of Lexington Avenue and 125th Street than the other buses.
